title: Teacher misconduct panel outcome: Mr Luke Berry
body: "The Secretary of State does not make these decisions themselves. They are made by a senior official on the recommendation of an independent panel.   Teacher’s name: Mr Luke Berry  Teacher reference number: 1081766  Teacher’s date of birth: 07 May 1988  Location teacher worked: Essex  Date of professional conduct panel: 27 March 2025 to 27 March 2025  Outcome type: Prohibition order  Notice is hereby given that, in accordance with The Teachers’ Disciplinary (England) Regulations 2012, a professional conduct panel was convened to consider the case of Mr Luke Berry, formerly employed in Essex.    Teacher misconduct   Ground Floor, South Cheylesmore House 5 Quinton RoadCoventryCV1 2WT     Email TRA.Casework@education.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7593 5393    Information about regulating the teaching profession and the process for dealing with serious teacher misconduct.   "
